reviews.site: Koreatown - Korean Fried Chicken (Clifton - Byron Pl)
reviews.text:
very nice wings everytime 
highly recommend

reviews.site: Wing Fest All Stars (Colchester - Challenge Way)
reviews.text: Food was great but please be mindful of the amount of bbq sauce you put in. Maybe think of putting the sauce on its own
The batter on the chicken was too spicy and the barbecue sauce on the fries was too much, but other than that, we enjoyed our order.
Tasty and unique, would order again!
first time ordering meat was nice but everything else was bland buns to soft chips a bit to soft

reviews.site: WTF! - Mind-Blowing Vegan Burgers🌱(Kensal Rise - Station Terrace)
reviews.text: BEWARE. This place is an absolute scam. I ordered two bacon cheezeburgers. I was sent what appears to be three real meat chicken nuggets with mayo on a sad disgusting bun along with real cheese. Absolutely despicable that this restaurant is doing this. DO NOT ORDER FROM HERE!
tender and crispy and cooked to perfection. Definitely one to try if you have not
Order was delivered so late I didn’t eat it
Really Tasty Onion Rings, would 100% order again

reviews.site: Hot Chick - Award-Winning Saucy Fried Chicken (Tunbridge Wells - Tunbridge Rd)
reviews.text: Missing a whole meal from the order and came over an 1 hour and 40 minutes of making the order
